user.title: Connect to Umami Analytics
user.description: Enter your Umami instance details. For self-hosted, use username/password. For Umami Cloud, use your API key.

sites.title: Select websites to monitor
sites.description: Choose which Umami websites you want to track in Home Assistant.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your username/password or API key.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Umami instance. Check the URL.
error.no_sites_selected: Please select at least one website.

abort.already_configured: This Umami instance is already configured.

init.title: Umami Analytics Options
init.description: Configure the time range and update interval for your Umami sensors.

refresh.name: Refresh data
refresh.description: Force an immediate refresh of all Umami Analytics data.

get_stats.name: Get stats
get_stats.description: Fetch current statistics for all monitored sites. Returns stats as response data.

time_range.name: Time range
time_range.description: Time range for stats. Defaults to the configured time range if not specified.

track_event.name: Track event
track_event.description: Send a custom event to an Umami website.

website_id.name: Website ID
website_id.description: The Umami website ID to send the event to.

event_name.name: Event name
event_name.description: Name of the event to track.

url.name: URL path
url.description: URL path associated with the event (default: /).

data.name: Event data
data.description: Additional data to attach to the event as key-value pairs.
